Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One
Off Calendar Nov-14-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF HYUNSON YI's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Plaintiff'S Requests For Production Of Documents, Set One.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion to compel DENIED. While general objections are rarely appropriate, Defendant has still substantively responded and stated what it would produce, and indeed, that it has produced all records it has about the subject vehicle. Plaintiff does not prove that there were substantive meet-and-confer efforts after the August 26 response by Defense counsel to meet-and-confer.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and email it to Judge Pro Tem Scott Borrowman.

Judge Pro Tem: Scott Borrowman; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (525/JPT)
